Default path: spawn the Python MCP sidecar and call its health_check tool.
--native path: run parallel probes in-process against the configured
backend (Supabase PostgREST or Postgres via pgx) and the configured
embedding provider. Native mode is ~10x faster because it skips the
sidecar startup.

Embedder probe is config-validation-only by default to avoid a paid
API call on every invocation. Pass --live-embedder to issue a real
round-trip embedding request.

Usage:
  ogham health [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help            help for health
      --live-embedder   Native: make a real embedding API call (costs one provider token)

Global Flags:
      --legacy          Route through the Python MCP sidecar instead of native Go
      --python          Alias for --legacy
  -q, --quiet           Suppress stderr informational notices (sidecar fallback message)
      --text            Human-readable output (default is JSON for LLM / script consumption)
  -v, --verbose count   Increase stderr log verbosity (-v = info, -vv = debug)
